details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, extracted data from the actual page snapshot using grep/sed, and correctly reported the 3 most recent years: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier). The raw page data confirms these names were on the page and were not hallucinated.
